question: Will over 70% of Manifold users think that Elon Musk does not deserve 100 billion dollars?
background:
Resolves according to this poll

(https://manifold.markets/embed/KeenenWatts/does-elon-musk-deserve-100-billion)
Take the total vote on "No", divided by the total number of voters on the market, to compute the % voted on "No".

Market Resolves Yes if the % voted on "No" is larger than 70% at the end of 2024
